overall.description: A nighttime walk along a foggy waterfront promenade in a video game environment (GTA V style). The footage begins in first-person perspective, passing a female pedestrian and food stand, then switches to third-person follow camera behind a male character in a hoodie continuing along the path.

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the waterfront path in first-person perspective, approaching a pedestrian

notable_agents.action: woman in white dress with red hair walking toward camera then passing by on the left side

entered.detail: wooden pier structure extending over dark water with railings
tall metal pole with bright light illuminating the foggy atmosphere
white concrete benches lined along the right side of the path

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a foggy night along a waterfront promenade. The camera moves forward in first-person perspective, approaching a woman in a white dress who walks past on the left. Street lamps cast artificial light through the mist, illuminating the concrete path, white benches, and the dark water to the left.

scene_state.functional_zone: waterfront path approaching food vendor area

agents.ego_description: continuing along the waterfront path, passing benches and approaching a lit food stand

entered.detail: yellow roofed hot dog stand with red signage and menu boards

segments.scene_description: The walk continues along the foggy waterfront path. The trash can passes out of view behind as a yellow-roofed food stand comes into view on the right. The path remains bordered by the water on the left and grassy areas with palm trees on the right, with street lamps providing the only illumination.

scene_state.functional_zone: waterfront promenade approaching small building with fenced area

events.description: camera perspective switches from first person to third person follow behind male character in grey hoodie
player character passes a pedestrian in yellow shirt walking in the opposite direction

agents.ego_description: male character in grey hoodie and red pants walking steadily along the waterfront, controlled by player

notable_agents.action: player-controlled male character with brown hair, grey hoodie, and red pants walking forward
pedestrian in yellow shirt and tan shorts walking toward and passing the player character

entered.detail: small rectangular building with red tile roof at the end of the path
black iron fence running along the right side of the walkway

segments.scene_description: The perspective shifts to third-person follow behind a male character in a grey hoodie. The character walks past the food stand and continues along the path, passing another pedestrian in a yellow shirt. A small white building with a red roof becomes prominent ahead, while a black metal fence appears on the right side of the path.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous journey along a foggy nighttime waterfront that transitions from a first-person perspective into a third-person follow camera. It begins by moving forward through the mist, passing a woman in a white dress as street lamps illuminate the concrete path and the dark water to the left. As the camera continues along the promenade, the view opens up to reveal a yellow-roofed food stand on the right, bordered by grassy areas and palm trees. The perspective then shifts to follow behind a male character in a grey hoodie who walks past the stand and another pedestrian in a yellow shirt. The scene finally expands to show a black metal fence on the right and a small white building with a red roof appearing ahead in the distance.
